locations.name: 西高止山脉
locations.summary: 西高止山脉（Western Ghats，卡纳达语：ಸಹ್ಯಾದ್ರಿ）是印度南部的一座山脉，位于德干高原的西部，呈南北走向，长度约1600公里，海拔平均为900米，纵穿马哈拉施特拉邦、卡纳塔克邦和喀拉拉邦。西高止山脉东坡平缓，西坡陡峭。…

relations.subject: Malabar barbet
relations.evidence: |year=1847 |journal=Journal of the Asiatic Society of Bengal |volume=16 |issue=1 |pages=385–387 |url=https://archive.org/details/journalofasiatic161asia/page/386 |title=Report of the Curator, Museum of Zoology}} | range_map=MegalaimaMalabaricaMap.png | synonyms = Bucco malabaricus, Xantholaema malabarica, Megalaima malabarica }} The Malabar barbet (Psilopogon malabaricus) is an Asian barbet native to the Western Ghats in India. It was formerly treated as a race of the crimson-fronted barbet (Psilopogon rubricapillus)
